1: -module(iguana_cli_SUITE).
    2: -include_lib("common_test/include/ct.hrl").
    3: -export([all/0, init_per_suite/1, end_per_suite/1]).
    4: -export([test_main_usage/1, test_main_bench/1, test_main_sync/1]).
    5: 
    6: all() -> [test_main_usage, test_main_bench, test_main_sync].
    7: 
    8: init_per_suite(Config) ->
    9:     application:ensure_all_started(iguana),
   10:     Config.
   11: 
   12: end_per_suite(_Config) ->
   13:     application:stop(iguana),
   14:     ok.
   15: 
   16: test_main_usage(_Config) ->
   17:     %% Check that it prints usage and returns ok (or whatever it returns)
   18:     %% io:format output is hard to capture in CT without redirection, but we can verify it doesn't crash.
   19:     iguana_cli:main([]),
   20:     ok.
   21: 
   22: test_main_bench(_Config) ->
   23:     %% benchmark:run() returns 'ok' (result of io:format)
   24:     ok = iguana_cli:main(["bench"]),
   25:     ok.
   26: 
   27: test_main_sync(_Config) ->
   28:     %% os:cmd returns a string. We just ensure it doesn't crash.
   29:     _Result = iguana_cli:main(["sync"]),
   30:     ok.
